message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
}

actor "ユーザ" as User
boundary "ブラウザ" as Browser
control "web.php" as Web
control "Kouka2_1Controller" as C
entity "Restdata" as R
boundary "index.blade.php" as IndexView
boundary "show.blade.php" as ShowView

User -> Browser : 該当ページをリクエスト[/kouka2_1]
Browser -> Web : GET[/kouka2_1]
Web -> C : @index
C -> R : all()
R --> C
C -> IndexView

User -> Browser : 検索ボタンを押下
Browser -> Web : GET[/kouka2_1/find]
Web -> C : @find
C -> R : where()->first()
R --> C
C -> ShowView
@enduml
